title: Emergency power outage: Portion of George Industrial
description: GEORGE NEWS - There is an emergency...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - There is an emergency interruption of the electricity supply for a portion of George Industrial.


> The following area will be affected:


- Foundry Street
- Brick Road
- Clay Road

A planned electricity supply interruption which was scheduled to take place on Friday 19 April from 08:00 to 15:00, will no longer take place as planned.

It has been moved to the alternative date of Monday 22 April from 08:00 to 15:00.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
